title: Board scheduled backup
excerpt:
Hi, 
Since the board keeps changing is there a way to back it up every X days? 
Like export it to a google sheet so I can see history… 
Thanks

posts.author: eranbr (Eran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Since the board keeps changing is there a way to back it up every X days?
Like export it to a google sheet so I can see history…

Thanks

posts.author: V.B.Music (Mike  Alducin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! @eranbr @hlopezvc. I think one solution for you would be to integrate a service like integromat. In integromat you can do that specific thing you want. Every time period Integromat can save the data of a board and put it in drop box for example.
